docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT - OUT OF STATE DEFENDENT SERVICE, PER CCP 415.40. VIA FIRST-CLASS CERTIFIED MAIL, POSTAGE PREPAID, REQUIRING A RETURN RECEIPT.
